Episodes.Title: The Church on Ruby Road
Episodes.Actors: Ncuti Gatwa, Millie Gibson, Davina McCall
Episodes.Plot: Long ago on Christmas Eve, a baby was abandoned in the snow. Today, Ruby Sunday meets the Doctor, stolen babies, goblins and perhaps the secret of her birth.

Episodes.Title: Space Babies
Episodes.Actors: Ncuti Gatwa, Millie Gibson, Robert Strange
Episodes.Plot: Ruby learns the Doctor's amazing secrets when he takes her to the far future. There, they find a baby farm run by babies. But can they be saved from the terrifying bogeyman?

Episodes.Title: The Devil's Chord
Episodes.Actors: Ncuti Gatwa, Millie Gibson, Jeremy Limb
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Ruby meet The Beatles but discover that the all-powerful Maestro is changing history. London becomes a battleground with the future of humanity at stake.

Episodes.Title: Boom
Episodes.Actors: Ncuti Gatwa, Millie Gibson, Joe Anderson
Episodes.Plot: Caught in the middle of a devastating war on Kastarion 3, the Doctor is trapped when he steps on a landmine. Can he save himself and Ruby, plus the entire planet - without moving?

Episodes.Title: 73 Yards
Episodes.Actors: Ncuti Gatwa, Millie Gibson, Hilary Hobson
Episodes.Plot: Landing on the Welsh coast, the Doctor and Ruby embark on the strangest journey of their lives. In a rain-lashed pub, the locals sit in fear of ancient legends coming to life.

Episodes.Title: Dot and Bubble
Episodes.Actors: Ncuti Gatwa, Millie Gibson, Callie Cooke
Episodes.Plot: The world of Finetime seems happy and harmonious. But an awful terror is preying on the citizens. Can the Doctor and Ruby make them see the truth before it's too late?

Episodes.Title: Rogue
Episodes.Actors: Ncuti Gatwa, Millie Gibson, Paul Forman
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Ruby land in 1813, where guests at a duchess's party are being murdered, and a mysterious bounty hunter called Rogue is about to change the Doctor's life forever.

Episodes.Title: The Legend of Ruby Sunday
Episodes.Actors: Ncuti Gatwa, Millie Gibson, Jemma Redgrave
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and UNIT investigate Ruby's past. But as the Time Window reveals horrifying secrets from Christmas Eve, the mysterious Triad Technology unleash the greatest evil of all.

Episodes.Title: Empire of Death
Episodes.Actors: Ncuti Gatwa, Millie Gibson, Gabriel Woolf
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor has lost, his ageless enemy reigns supreme, and a shadow is falling over creation. Nothing can stop the devastation - except, perhaps, one woman.
